Orb Layout — Dev

Click an orb to select — a cyan crosshair shows its X/Y centre; line it up on the bubble. Drag to move · wheel or [ ] = size · arrows nudge (Shift=×4). Click EMPTY space to drop a new orb on a bubble · Del removes · then hit Done.
